title: rubus incurvatiformis
intro: Rubus incurvatiformis is a species of raspberry native to China, characterized by its unique incurved leaves and edible fruits. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus incurvatiformis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are traditionally used to treat digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
